display_name: FDA MAUDE Safety Events for ML-Enabled Devices
citation: More than algorithms: an analysis of safety events involving ML-enabled medical devices reported to the FDA. J Am Med Inform Assoc. 2023;30(7):1227-1236.
case_summary: Analyzed 266 FDA MAUDE safety events involving approved ML medical devices.
